_comment: Merchant-specific production status → Excel fill color mapping. Operator fills this per merchant. Hex colors without leading #.
_instructions: Copy the _example_colors block above and rename to your merchant's actual status values.
The build_handoff_excel.py script loads this file via SHOPIFY_COLOR_MAP env var.
Status matching is case-insensitive substring match — 'shipped' matches 'SHIPPED', 'Shipped to customer', etc.
Chargeback color (light red #FFB3B3) is hardcoded in build_handoff_excel.py — not configurable here.
Delete this _comment, _format, _example_colors, and _instructions block before committing merchant config.
